name: Oxley Holdings Limited
summary: Oxley Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, invests in and develops properties. The company operates through Property Development, Property Investment, Hotel, and Construction segments. It develops residential, commercial, industrial, and hospitality projects. The company also leases properties; owns and operates hotels; invests in securities; and constructs commercial and residential properties. It operates in Singapore, the United Kingdom, Ireland, Cambodia, Malaysia, and Australia. Oxley Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Singapore.
